data.name: Lust Galaxy 🪐 🔞
data.detailed_description:
Ever dreamed of a hot and dangerous femme fatale? Lust Galaxy🪐🔞 offers you an exclusive opportunity to save one from a prison for extremely dangerous female criminals - but do you have got what it takes to handle her?



You’ll be playing as Roy, a former special agent with prominent skills in interrogation and investigation. He’s being recruited to pry out the secrets of dangerous criminals - Lilith and Selena, whose hidden truths can unravel critical events and save a lot of lives.

Prison is inescapable on its own, but that’s where you come in - the outcome for you, heroines and a lot of other people involved relies solely on your actions! Your decisions shape the story as you delve deeper into girls’ mysteries and personalities.



Will you aid Lilith in her escape? Or uncover Selena’s weapon secrets? Maybe you’ll be the one to understand the cryptic messages of the cold assassin R127? The game makes you balance between intense interactive dialogues, escape planning and morally challenging choices.

Experience an unusual story taking place at a spaceship prison where your interactions influence destinies! Explore themes of trust, power and redemption in the immersive and emotionally charged visual novel.

Features:
  • Futuristic and intriguing setting - try to help hotties escape the spaceship prison!
  • Diverse adult scenery - a wide range of lewd encounters await you while you shape the story.
  • Outstanding 3D graphics to further enhance the immersion paired with attentively crafted animations await!
  • Your choice matters - pick whom to help if to help at all. Everything depends on you!
  • Unique and deep characters with their own motivations and heart-wrecking backstories.
  • Easy and intuitive gameplay - one hand would be enough 😏

data.short_description: Immerse yourself in the cosmic passions of Lust Galaxy🪐🔞, an adult visual novel that opens the doors to a world of intrigue and danger.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or above
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Direct X compatible
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
